name: svg-tool
description: TypeScript SVG tile library + AI generator for game art (terrain, buildings, units, UI).

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && bun run bundle:cli && bun run bundle:mcp
scripts.bundle:cli: bun build src/cli/svg-tool.ts --outfile dist/cli/svg-tool.js --target node --format esm
scripts.bundle:mcp: bun build src/mcp/main.ts --outfile dist/mcp/main.js --target node --format esm
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run test:coverage
